attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who commits early and drives tempo himself rather than waiting for decisive final km attacks. Excels in uphill sprint finishes from reduced groups (2-4km climbs), using sustained power rather than explosive accelerations.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on domestique lead-outs through technical finishes (evidenced by CRADDOCK tow at Vuelta). When team depleted, defaults to solo breakaway efforts. EF occasionally deploys him strategically to burn rival domestiques even on stages without win potential.
terrain_preference: Coastal or rolling finishes with 2-4km moderate climbs suit best. Struggles on steepest gradients (caught within 75-100m on max pitch). Rolling TT courses expose pacing limitations—strong first half but fades. Chaotic weather conditions have yielded opportunistic wins when peloton disorganized.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive kick on steepest gradients and against top-tier sprinters. Gets dropped on hilly-sprint profiles that theoretically suit puncheurs when form is poor. Cannot extend advantages in second half of sustained efforts (TT fade pattern, caught close to line).
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist: won 6+ stages from early breaks, often driving tempo entire day himself
Uphill sprint finisher: multiple wins on 2km coastal/rolling climbs, beating pure climbers with power reserve
KOM jersey tactician: attacked solo at race start for uncontested points, mathematical certainty prioritized
Domestique-dependent technical finishes: needs lead-out through complex finals to maximize win probability
Weather/chaos opportunist: won from breakaway when peloton disorganized by conditions or crashes
Pacing fade pattern: leads at TT checkpoints but cannot sustain, caught within final 100m multiple times
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows inconsistency—dropped on terrain that suits him (Giro hilly sprint), though tactical TTT win demonstrates capacity remains when protected. Earlier elimination suggests declining baseline compared to 2021-2022 dominance.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
